title: Suicide Methods Among Brazilian Women from 1980 to 2019: Influence of Age, Period, and Cohort
author: Meira, Karina Cardoso
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study aimed to analyze the effects of age, period, and cohort on suicides among women by hanging, strangulation, suffocation, firearm use, and self-poisoning in different Brazilian regions from 1980 to 2019. This ecological time-trend study employed estimable functions to estimate APC models, facilitated by the Epi library of the R statistical program, version 4.2.1.
steps_raw: This study aimed to analyze the effects of age, period, and cohort on suicides among women by hanging, strangulation, suffocation, firearm use, and self-poisoning in different Brazilian regions from 1980 to 2019. This ecological time-trend study employed estimable functions to estimate APC models, facilitated by the Epi library of the R statistical program, version 4.2.1.
